title: Webhooks, Replay Defense, SSRF, Abuse, and Sensitive Business Flows · Runtime Recall
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs webhooks, replay defense, ssrf, abuse, and sensitive business flows from bounded request and server evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the webhook authenticity, replay, and abuse defense. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for webhook authenticity, replay, and abuse defense after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound and retain exact raw body bytes, select expected signature scheme and key, compare in constant time, and only then parse and authorize the event.
Validate timestamp or nonce window, event ID uniqueness, tenant, type, ordering, duplicate delivery, and durable processing state before effects.
Acknowledge only after durable acceptance, move long work to bounded processing, classify retries, make effects idempotent, and expose operator recovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
